{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Old Tolyer
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Old Tolyer]] is a major population center on the planet [[Naricius]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
